form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into sixth behind Crazy at Alexandra Park over 2200m in a 3yo+ on March 13 at $9.80. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second behind Our Col at Alexandra Park over 2200m in a 3yo+ on March 27 at $25.40. With even luck is a winning chance.

form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 5th (Fr11) over 2600m at Rangiora beaten 5.5 m by Tessamae (3:27.40) in 3yo+ on March 1 at $5.90. At the previous start 6th (Fr12) over 2400m at Ashburton Raceway beaten 10 m by Buffy Northstains (3:04.80) in 3yo+ on February 22 at $6.90. Nicely drawn and expected to run a bold race.
